AT0017.title: Multi-Instance Tools
AT0017.description: Multi-instance software allows running multiple clients of the same software simultaneously on one device, with each client operating normally. It is a tool that removes restrictions on single-instance software programs and games, enabling multiple clients to run without a virtual machine.

references.title: 手机窗口化多开软件怎么设置的?手机窗口化多开软件推荐_游戏_操作...
